rooms.description: You are on a sunny beach. The sand is golden. There is a locked chest here.

items.name: Rock
items.description: A heavy gray rock that seems stuck in the sand.

rooms.description: A dense jungle with tall trees. You can see something shiny on the ground.

items.name: Machete
items.description: A sharp blade, useful for cutting vines.
items.useText: You swing the machete aggressively! *SWOOSH* Some leaves fall to the ground.

rooms.description: A secret room filled with gold, diamonds and ancient artifacts!
